summary: Iter 33: Verified all 9 bug-fix items end-to-end. Backend 9/9 pytest pass — allow_negative=True for transactions, full sale flow (PATCH car→sale income→employee_share expense), DELETE /capital/movements with revert + 400-block on transaction-bound, customer DELETE, branches CRUD regression. Frontend: Customers bulk delete buttons, Sold date filter, Capital (Sermaye) report type with all 4 cards + table, Capital Detail modal with delete-movement-* buttons all present. Dashboard loads cleanly. Mixed Content /api/notifications HTTP regression from iter 29-30 still present (LOW).

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content error: /api/notifications/?unread_only=false is being called over HTTP (insecure) while the page is HTTPS, request blocked. 'Bildirimler yüklenemedi' fires twice on every Dashboard load. Pre-existing regression carried over from iter 29-30.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/transactions expense w/ car_id returns 200 even when capital=0 (allow_negative=True; no insufficient_capital thrown)
Backend: Full sale flow — PATCH car status=Satıldı + employee_share, POST income Araç Satışı, POST expense Çalışan Payı (all 200)
Backend: DELETE /api/capital/movements/{id} on manual_deposit reverts balance and removes movement
Backend: DELETE /api/capital/movements/{id} on transaction-bound movement returns 400 with proper error
Frontend: Login → Dashboard, NET KÂR card visible
Frontend: customer-bulk-toggle-btn and customer-bulk-delete-btn present on Müşteriler page; toggle opens 'Sil (0)' button
Frontend: sold-date-filter / sold-start-date / sold-end-date all present on Satılan Araçlar page
Frontend: view-mode-toggle (Kart/Liste) present on Satılan Araçlar page
Frontend: Reports → report-type-capital exists; clicking renders capital-table + KASA GİRİŞİ / KASA ÇIKIŞI / NET AKIŞ / SON BAKİYE cards (verified visually with real numbers)
Frontend: Sermaye Detayı modal opens with 4 delete-movement-* buttons rendered for manual entries
action_items: [LOW/regression] Fix /api/notifications endpoint URL — frontend NotificationBell is calling http:// instead of https://. Likely a hardcoded URL or missing axios baseURL using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Same issue flagged in iter 29 + 30.
[Optional] sold-clear-date data-testid only renders when dates are filled — by design but worth confirming.
critical_code_review_comments: transactions.py: clean atomic capital flow with allow_negative=True on create/update/restore — correct fix for negative-balance expense recording. Insert rollback path on failure is proper.

capital.py DELETE /capital/movements/{id} guard set _DELETABLE_REASONS = {manual_deposit, manual_withdrawal, manual_set, capital_initialize} prevents deletion of transaction-bound movements — verified 400 returned.
Dashboard.netProfit formula now correctly subtracts Çalışan Payı per user request — visible NET KÂR card present.
handleCancelSale change (customer kept, type→Potansiyel) is the correct soft-revert pattern.
Mixed Content /api/notifications regression should be fixed at axios baseURL level (use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL consistently).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all requested features working; 1 pre-existing notifications regression)

seed_data_creation: Created/cleaned: TEST_iter31 cars, transactions, customers and manual capital movement (₺1234 deposit). All test data cleaned via DELETE in fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 bug-fix items from the user list are verified working. Backend pytest: /app/backend/tests/test_iter31.py covers expense-with-zero-capital, full sale flow (PATCH car), capital movement delete (revert + transaction-bound block), branches CRUD, customer delete. Only outstanding issue is recurring /api/notifications mixed-content HTTP error — main agent should grep frontend for any hardcoded http:// or notifications-specific baseURL.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: axios call to /api/notifications/ resolves to http:// while page is https://. Likely a hardcoded URL or missing protocol in NotificationBell/services notifications module.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: 1) Open frontend 2) Login 3) Console: 'Mixed Content: ... insecure XMLHttpRequest endpoint http://.../api/notifications/?unread_only=false'.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Ensure notifications axios call uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (https). Grep frontend for 'notifications/?unread_only' or 'notifications/' to find the offending caller.
